fields.description:
## Summary
MCP reconcile tool runs Jira-MUTATING bootstrap modes with zero gating, even under REBAR_MCP_READONLY=1. Verified LIVE (incident, remediated): a reconcile call with mode=bootstrap-strict from a sandboxed temp store, readonly server, executed against real Jira and created 19 real issues (DIG-5615..DIG-5633; all deleted, deletion verified by JQL).

## Reproduction Steps
(verified on installed 0.4.0 == HEAD)
1. Export REBAR_MCP_READONLY=1 and build the MCP server (build_server()).
2. Call tool reconcile with {"mode": "bootstrap-strict"} (acli installed + credentialed).
3. Observe the pass runs and applies real Jira mutations (OK: applied 10 of 993).

## Expected vs Actual
- Expected: any Jira-mutating mode requires REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE=1; a readonly server exposes at most reconcile-check/dry-run.
- Actual: bootstrap-strict/bootstrap-throttle mutate real Jira ungated under readonly; only mode=="live" is checked.

## Source
- src/rebar/mcp_server.py:271-276 — gate checks only the literal string "live".
- src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/mode.py:106-112 — MODE_CAPS: BOOTSTRAP_STRICT=10, BOOTSTRAP_THROTTLE=100 APPLIED mutations/pass; only RECONCILE_CHECK/DRY_RUN are cap-0.
- Note dry-run is not a pure read either: it writes bridge_state/ and the invariants path files local bug tickets.

## Fix direction
Gate by capability, not string: parse the mode via the Mode enum and require the env var for any mode whose MODE_CAPS != 0; under _readonly(), restrict reconcile to cap-0 modes (or hide it). Correct docstrings + CLAUDE.md ("'live' mutates Jira" is dangerously incomplete — also __init__.py:404-409, tracked with bug frog-oryx-strut).

## Suggested RED test
Parametrize all five modes x {readonly, non-readonly} x {with, without REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE} with a fake acli on PATH that fails loudly if executed; assert only cap-0 modes pass without the env var and that readonly blocks mutating modes before any acli invocation. Never real credentials in tests.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bootstrap-strict/bootstrap-throttle (and live) require REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE=1 over MCP
- [ ] Under REBAR_MCP_READONLY=1 no Jira-mutating reconcile mode is callable
- [ ] Invalid mode strings produce a clean tool error (not a crash)
- [ ] RED test matrix above lands first and goes GREEN with the fix
- [ ] Docstrings/CLAUDE.md updated to name all mutating modes
